title: delphinium elatum subsp. tiroliense
intro: Delphinium elatum subsp. tiroliense, also known as the Tirolean larkspur, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the delphinium genus and is native to the European Alps. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, due to the presence of delphinine and other alkaloids. The health benefits of Delphinium elatum subsp. tiroliense include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to reduce muscle spasms and pain. Delphinium elatum subsp. tiroliense can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, but its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity and interactions.
